title: An Act authorizing the town of Groton to prohibit the use of second generation anticoagulant rodenticides

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Scarsdale of Pepperell, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5532) of Margaret R. Scarsdale (by vote of the town) that the town of Groton be authorized to prohibit the use of second generation anticoagulant rodenticides in said town.  Environment and Natural Resources.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Environment and Natural Resources

related_entities.name: committee on Environment and Natural Resources
the committee on Environment and Natural Resources

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 07/22/2026 from 01:00 PM-02:00 PM in A-2
